creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169108
hbase 1.2.0_1

Demons call to $PREFIX/hbase/bin/hbase-daemon.sh. Currently, although JDKs are installed as dependencies, JAVA_HOME isn't set by default.

Override this by patching the hbase-daemon.sh script to provide the default ${JAVA_HOME} as set by the ports framework.
